name: Janan Sawa
description: '''Janan Sawa''' (born March 18, 1956) ({{langx|syr|ܔܢܐܢ ܒܒܐ ܣܒ݂ܐ}}) is an [[Assyrian people|Assyrian]] musician who is noted for making [[Assyrian folk dance]]. Janan started singing in 1972, at the age of 17. Janan has performed throughout the world, and has visited his hometown of [[Duhok]] in [[Iraq]] on many occasions.
